evals.name: scaffold-drupal-docker
evals.prompt: I just started a new Drupal project with a Python RAG backend. The project has a Justfile, compose.yml with multiple services, pytest tests, openspec directory, and a GitLab CI pipeline. There's no AGENTS.md yet. Please create one for this project.
evals.expected_output: A complete AGENTS.md with all mandatory sections (Project Overview, Setup, Key Conventions, Code Style, Git Workflow, Package Management with Dependency Safety, Testing, Command Safety, Important Rules) plus conditional sections for OpenSpec and CI/CD. Should detect Docker-first convention, document Justfile commands, include live registry checks for Python/PyPI, and classify actual commands from the Justfile into safety tiers.

assertions.name: has_project_overview
assertions.check: Project Overview section exists

assertions.name: has_setup
assertions.check: Setup section with Docker-based commands

assertions.name: has_docker_first
assertions.check: Mentions Docker-first convention or running commands inside Docker

assertions.name: has_justfile_commands
assertions.check: References actual Justfile recipes (just build, just test, etc.)

assertions.name: has_git_workflow
assertions.check: Git workflow with commits, branching, and rebasing subsections

assertions.name: has_conventional_commits
assertions.check: Mentions Conventional Commits format

assertions.name: has_package_management
assertions.check: Package management section with Python/uv

assertions.name: has_dependency_safety
assertions.check: Dependency Safety subsection with live registry check commands

assertions.name: has_pypi_check
assertions.check: PyPI curl command for version verification

assertions.name: has_5day_quarantine
assertions.check: 5-day release quarantine rule

assertions.name: has_testing
assertions.check: Testing section mentioning pytest

assertions.name: has_command_safety
assertions.check: Command Safety section with Safe/Dangerous/Destructive tiers

assertions.name: has_important_rules
assertions.check: Important Rules section aggregating key guardrails

assertions.name: has_openspec
assertions.check: OpenSpec Change Management section

assertions.name: has_ci_cd
assertions.check: CI/CD section mentioning GitLab CI

assertions.name: no_makefile_reference
assertions.check: Should not reference Makefile when Justfile exists

evals.name: review-existing-agentsmd
evals.prompt: This project already has an AGENTS.md. Please review it for completeness and suggest any missing sections or improvements based on what you find in the project.
evals.expected_output: A gap analysis comparing the existing AGENTS.md against the skill blueprint. Should identify missing sections (e.g., Dependency Safety with registry checks, Command Safety tiers, OpenSpec section if openspec/ exists) and stale or incomplete content. Should NOT regenerate the whole file unprompted — should present findings and offer to fix.

assertions.name: reads_existing_agentsmd
assertions.check: Reads and acknowledges the existing AGENTS.md content

assertions.name: identifies_gaps
assertions.check: Lists specific missing or incomplete sections

assertions.name: mentions_dependency_safety
assertions.check: Flags missing or incomplete dependency safety / registry checks

assertions.name: mentions_command_safety
assertions.check: Flags missing command safety tiers if absent

assertions.name: offers_to_fix
assertions.check: Offers to generate missing sections or rewrite, rather than just dumping a full replacement

assertions.name: no_hallucinated_tools
assertions.check: Does not mention tools or configs that don't exist in the project

evals.name: pkg-managed-detection
evals.prompt: Create an AGENTS.md for this project please.
evals.expected_output: Should detect fs-pkg.json and recognize the project is pkg-managed. Should check for .agents/AGENTS.project.md — if empty or missing, switch to Project Additions mode and generate content into .agents/AGENTS.project.md (not root AGENTS.md). If .agents/AGENTS.project.md has content, stop. Should never overwrite the pkg-managed root AGENTS.md.

assertions.name: detects_pkg
assertions.check: Mentions fs-pkg.json or package-managed project

assertions.name: checks_project_md
assertions.check: Checks whether .agents/AGENTS.project.md exists and whether it has content

assertions.name: targets_project_md
assertions.check: Targets .agents/AGENTS.project.md for output, not root AGENTS.md

assertions.name: does_not_overwrite_root
assertions.check: Does NOT overwrite or replace the pkg-managed root AGENTS.md
